description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a bright red fuselage and wings, designed in a classic general aviation style. The aircraft features a high-wing configuration, providing stability and good visibility for the cockpit, which is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark window. The nose houses a two-blade propeller, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with minimal visible markings except for a small green detail on the left wingtip.
description: A small, red, high-wing single-propeller airplane with a conventional tail and fixed tricycle landing gear. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned at the front, with a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-blade propeller, nose wheel, and the full span of the high-mounted wing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit window, fixed tricycle landing gear, and the small green detail on the wingtip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and the horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear, but without the green wingtip detail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark window, likely single-seat.
